programmes.show_description: Gripping action thriller with Sam Worthington. When a troubled assassin hired to kill a young woman can't bring himself to pull the trigger, he chooses to protect her from her enemies instead.
Crime thriller with Adrien Brody. A trio of career criminals find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the police closing in, not realising that an even greater threat lurks inside.
London TV returns soon.

A woman claims her friend lost one of her dogs and that another pet died on her couch while she was away on vacation.
When a warehouse worker asks to take a few days off, he claims his boss wrongfully terminated him.
A man abandons his fiancée but suggests they go on their kayaking honeymoon anyway; he is accused of stealing property when he doesn't get his way.
A woman and her ex-husband argue over the unpaid title loan on a Chevy Impala after she turns in the car for missing payments.
An elderly woman publicly berates her longtime rival throughout their neighbourhood; he sues her for harassment.
A man insists he owes nothing to his ex-babysitter because her boyfriend allegedly stole property, and she damaged his truck.
Unwed parents, with a 20 year age difference, fight over an alleged assault.
A mother of two is accused of stealing her uncle's furniture after their lease-to-own agreement falls apart; she claims he took the furniture himself.
A man insists that a young boy looks and acts just like him but his ex-lover says it's impossible and sues him for filing for a paternity test.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
In May of 2019, Jennifer Farber Dulos dropped off her five children at school, drove to her Connecticut home, and was never seen again.
When Linda Anders is found dead at home, her wheelchair-bound husband Malcolm claims an intruder broke in. Police findings quickly change the course of the investigation.
Following a previous altercation, Cody Fisher was attending a Birmingham nightclub event with friends when he was attacked and stabbed in the chest, a 37-second fatal assault.
16-year-old Hani Hicham Abou El Kheir was fatally stabbed in London, UK, over twenty times on his way home in 2013 by a gang of up to ten masked youths.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Bookmaker Max Phillips learns that his son is dying in Vietnam, and risks everything to save him.
It is 2040. Boxing has been outlawed and is performed by androids, but one of the last human fighters has faith in a battered fighting robot.
Remake of the 1976 action thriller, with Ethan Hawke. A sergeant must protect cops and prisoners when his station is besieged by a corrupt policeman and his crew on New Year's Eve.
Tense thriller with Sam Worthington. An escaped convict threatens to jump from a skyscraper, while his brother takes advantage of the ensuing chaos to carry out a plan of his own.
Crime thriller starring Luke Goss. In his final mission, an elite hitman returns to erase his past, only to find that somebody has messed with his future.
Based on a true story, Corbin Bernsen stars as a dentist who (according to his wife) may also be a serial killer. Look out too for Dr Frasier Crane, Kelsey Grammer, in a supporting role.

While waiting to get a haircut, a man claims his good friend cut him with a new knife because he didn't like his jokes.
A caterer says a bride tried to blackmail her by demanding money in exchange for not writing a terrible online review of her business.
A woman is accused of breaking into her mother's house; she claims she lived there but wasn't allowed to have a key.
A troubled teen is accused of stealing money from her grandmother after leaving her custody.
A woman resorts to self-help in her efforts to financially recover from an alleged attack on her small dog.
A clubbing incident in Mexico allegedly leads to an ambush by teenagers in California when a car is vandalized with a crowbar.
When a check bounces, the payee is accused of using the check's routing information to retrieve money illegally.
A woman, not quite ready for a break up, allegedly keys her ex-lover's car and sprays his home with ketchup; anger management classes are required.
Sisters pull together to pay for their father's funeral only to be pulled apart by life insurance delays; the Judge takes the insurance company to task.

Charlotte Pinkney vanished from Ilfracombe after going to a party. Police launched a murder hunt when her handbag was found in undergrowth - would they find the perpetrator?
A Bournemouth hotelier called Peter Taylor gets away with murdering his wife in 1982; but when he conspires to kill his son-in-law nine years later, his luck runs out.
In 2004, Zainab Begum from Lancashire, UK, vanished, and her daughter Samina grew suspicious when her brothers-in-law showed little concern. Her body was never recovered.
In 2017, 15-year-old Kyron Webb was fatally stabbed on Moston Lane, Manchester, UK, by two masked youths. CCTV showed Kyron approaching the pair before being stabbed twice.

A convalescent is trapped in a living nightmare during a plane journey when he sees a gremlin on the wing. Guest starring William Shatner.
The twisted tale of a unique watch with the ability to freeze time and stop all movement in the world. Guest starring Jenny Agutter.
Fact-based drama, with Jessica Chastain. A CIA operative spends 10 years searching for information on the whereabouts of Osama bin Laden, ultimately leading to the final raid on his hideout.
